name: Under-30 Impact Person of the Year
description: This nomination is for a young individual under the age of 30 who has made a significant contribution to their field or community, demonstrating innovation, leadership, and purpose-driven impact.

fields.label: Do you reside in Redemption City?
Full name of the young individual (Under 30) you wish to nominate
In less than 200 words, explain how the nominee has made a meaningful impact in their community or field of endeavour.
In less than 200 words, describe the nominee's innovation, creativity, or bold initiative that sets them apart.
Rate the nominee's level of innovation
In less than 200 words, explain how the nominee has demonstrated leadership or inspired others.
Rate the nominee's leadership and influence
In less than 200 words, describe the nominee's personal or professional character and how it supports their impact.
Rate the nominee's character and professionalism
